title: Crispy Fried Peruvian Pumpkin Seeds Ceviche
description: A Peruvian-inspired dish that combines the crunch of fried pumpkin seeds with the refreshing flavors of ceviche, served in a bed of crisp baby lettuce leaves.

ingredients.name: 1 pound pumpkin seeds
ingredients.notes: any type, such as pepitas or hulled seeds

instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°F (90°C) and dehydrate the pumpkin seeds for 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, mix together the lime juice, red onion, cilantro, avocado, and jalapeño pepper.
Add the pumpkin seeds to the bowl and toss to coat with the lime juice mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat about 1/2 inch (1 cm) of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Dust the pumpkin seeds with cornstarch and fry until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Drain the fried pumpkin seeds on paper towels and let cool slightly.
To serve, place a bed of baby lettuce leaves on a plate or in a bowl.
Top the lettuce with the ceviche mixture and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
